title: Structure Steering Document - Codebase Organization & Patterns
response:
Feedback Summary (4 comments):

Specific Text Comments:
1. "ui/                   # Base UI components (Radix ...": Instead of Radix, frontend is using ShardCN as the frontend UI library. This folder is storing all the ShardCN components
2. "**Components**: `PascalCase.tsx` (e.g., `GoogleAut...": All file names should be in kebab-case convention.
3. "**Types/Interfaces**: `kebab-case.type.ts` or `keb...": Type and interfaces should be with `*.type.ts`. Only DTO class Object in the backend is using `*.dto.ts`.
4. "export function ComponentName({ prop }: ComponentP...": Use `FC` from `react` instead of hard coded the type.
Use arrow function instead of traditional `function` syntax.
Example:
```
export const ComponentName: FC<ComponentProps> = ({prop}) => {}
```

comments.comment: Instead of Radix, frontend is using ShardCN as the frontend UI library. This folder is storing all the ShardCN components
All file names should be in kebab-case convention.
Type and interfaces should be with `*.type.ts`. Only DTO class Object in the backend is using `*.dto.ts`.

Use `FC` from `react` instead of hard coded the type.
Use arrow function instead of traditional `function` syntax.
Example:
```
export const ComponentName: FC<ComponentProps> = ({prop}) => {}
```
